question: What are the names of people who do not play poker?
gold_sql: SELECT Name FROM people WHERE People_ID NOT IN (SELECT People_ID FROM poker_player)
predicted_sql: SELECT name FROM people EXCEPT SELECT T2.name FROM poker_player AS T1 JOIN people AS T2 ON T1.people_id = T2.people_id
raw_response: SELECT name FROM people EXCEPT SELECT T2.name FROM poker_player AS T1 JOIN people AS T2 ON T1.people_id = T2.people_id
